title: Minimum Essential Standards, Assessment and Rating for Postgraduate Institutions and Minimum Standards of Postgraduate Siddha Education Regulations, 2024
notes: PG Siddha 2024. Per-programme, ratio-driven model — only the flat/threshold-shaped standards confirmed in the source are encoded: PG teaching-department area (>=25 sqm), seminar hall, additional IPD beds at 1:4 per PG seat (byIntake), departmental average bed occupancy (>=60%), digital library computers 1:5 (byIntake), AEBAS, website. Guide:student ratios + per-department cadres are report-driven (staff-table/roster). supportedIntakes are representative per-programme PG seat counts. Punitive policy is the ASU-wide board policy (2026-27).
